ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "fire_agency" TEXT /* Code of the fire agency responding to the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., structure fire, alarm) */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Time of the incident */,
  "incident_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the incident */,
  "disposition_code" TEXT /* Disposition code of the incident */,
  "disposition_description" TEXT /* Disposition description of the incident */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the incident occurred */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the incident */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the incident */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Response time of the fire agency */,
  "incident_cause" TEXT /* Cause of the incident */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Status of the incident */,
  "fire_agency_code" TEXT /* Code of the fire agency responding to the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_incident_type FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_disposition_code FOREIGN KEY ("disposition_code") REFERENCES dispositions ("disposition_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_fire_agency FOREIGN KEY ("fire_agency") REFERENCES fire_agencies ("fire_agency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "incident_type_code" TEXT /* Code of the incident type */,
  "incident_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  "incident_type_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the incident type */,
  "incident_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the incident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dispositions" (
  "disposition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disposition */,
  "disposition_code" TEXT /* Code of the disposition */,
  "disposition_description" TEXT /* Description of the disposition */,
  "disposition_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the disposition */,
  "disposition_follow_up" TEXT /* Indicates if follow-up actions are required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disposition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fire_agencies" (
  "fire_agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fire agency */,
  "fire_agency_code" TEXT /* Code of the fire agency */,
  "fire_agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the fire agency */,
  "fire_agency_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the fire agency */,
  "fire_agency_email" TEXT /* Email address of the fire agency */,
  "fire_agency_address" TEXT /* Address of the fire agency */,
  "fire_agency_city" TEXT /* City of the fire agency */,
  "fire_agency_state" TEXT /* State of the fire agency */,
  "fire_agency_zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the fire agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fire_agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_uses" (
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land use */,
  "land_use_code" INTEGER /* Code of the land use */,
  "land_use_description" TEXT /* Description of the land use */,
  "land_use_category" TEXT /* Category of the land use */,
  "land_use_regulations" TEXT /* Regulations or codes applicable to the land use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("land_use_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "risk_assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being assessed */,
  "risk_score" INTEGER /* Risk score of the property */,
  "fire_frequency" INTEGER /* Fire frequency of the property */,
  "fire_duration" INTEGER /* Fire duration of the property */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the risk assessment */,
  "assessment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the assessment */,
  "assessment_follow_up" TEXT /* Indicates if follow-up actions are required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_property" (
  "incident_property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident-property relationship */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "incident_property_status" TEXT /* Status of the property during the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_property_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fire official, inspector, administrator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions for the user role */,
  "activity_log" TEXT /* Activity log for audit purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
